subcodes.first_line: Through the stirring eloquence of Aqa Zia did he come, and through the word "We strengthened them with a third," and likewise through Aqa Badi', therefore by this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بفول زرانگیز آقا ضیاء آمد و بکلمه عززناهما بثالث متکلم و همچنین آقا بدیع لذا باین لوح
